item.title: Kubernetes Audit Policy
item.author: Author
item.description: Audit Stages Stage Description RequestReceived The stage for events generated as soon as the audit handler receives the request, and before it is delegated down the handler chain. ResponseStarted Once the response headers are sent, but before the response body is sent. This stage is only generated for long-running requests (e.g. watch). ResponseComplete The response body has been completed and no more bytes will be sent.
